CREATE TABLE composite_test (id INT, name VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO composite_test (id, name) VALUES (1, composite('Miles', 'Herbie', 'Wayne', 'Ron', 'Tony'));
SELECT (SELECT composite_ref(composite('Tom', 'Jerry'), 0) FROM dual) AS nested_member_0;
SELECT (SELECT composite_ref(composite(name, 'Sample', 'Data'), 1) FROM composite_test WHERE id = 1) AS from_composite_test;
SELECT composite_ref(composite('One', 'Two', 'Three', 'Four'), (SELECT COUNT(*) - 1 FROM composite_test)) AS boundary_member;
